how_it_works.title: Pick, consult, receive
how_it_works.subtitle: Three simple steps from choice to delivery — with live consultation and a video preview of every order.

steps.title: Choose a product
steps.text: Search by product name or by condition. Each card lists indications, usage and contraindications.

steps.title: Get a consultation
steps.text: Message us on WhatsApp — we'll pick a course for your diagnosis and answer your questions for free.

steps.title: Pay and receive
steps.text: Kaspi payment or cash on delivery. Video preview before shipping, tracking sent after payment.

trust_section.title: Quality you can see
trust_section.subtitle: Natural ingredients, transparent process, live support.

natural.title: 100% natural
natural.text: Just plants, water and cold pressing. No preservatives.

delivery.text: KazPost, CDEK, courier and InDrive — across Kazakhstan and Russia.

consult.title: Free consultation
consult.text: We help pick the right product for your diagnosis.

quality.title: Video preview before shipping

about.title: What we do
about.text: We craft juices, tinctures and extracts from medicinal herbs, roots, seeds and fruits. We pick products for your diagnosis and consult for free on WhatsApp.

items.q: Where are you and how do you ship?
items.a: We're in Petropavlovsk. We ship across Kazakhstan via KazPost. To Shchuchinsk, Kokshetau, Astana and Kostanay we can also ship via InDrive.

items.q: How do I know which product suits me?
items.a: Get a diagnosis from your doctor, send it to our consultant on WhatsApp — we'll suggest a treatment course.

items.q: Where can I get a personal consultation?
items.a: Consultations happen on WhatsApp — every day from 9:00 to 18:00.

items.q: How do I place an order?
items.a: Find a product via search (by name or condition), add it to cart, fill in delivery details and pick a payment method. You'll receive a Kaspi invoice, and after payment — tracking and a video preview on WhatsApp.
We issue a Kaspi invoice before shipping. After payment you get a video preview of the packed order and a tracking number.

items.q: How long does the product last?
items.a: Up to 12 months in the fridge.

banner.title: Free consultation on WhatsApp
banner.subtitle: We'll pick the right product for your diagnosis. Available 9:00 — 18:00 every day.
